boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release payment after a sanctions near-match remains visible?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Monitor-only no-block permits release only on exact match of name, country, tax ID, account, and disposition.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: CLR-TES-074 requires exact account match; FLAG-TES-074 shows visible flag.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Account mismatch (7205 vs 7025) and visible flag leave boundary open.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: Clearance must precede release; current sources show unresolved flag.

final_answer: Payment release may not proceed. CLR-TES-074 lists account ending 7025 while PAY-TES-074 specifies 7205; FLAG-TES-074 remains visible with no disposition match. Policy STD-TES-074-P requires exact alignment of tax ID, account, and monitor-only status before release. Source boundary stays open.
